## getToggleArray() function

> This API is provided as a preview for developers and may change based on feedback that we receive. Do not use this API in a production environment.
> 

函数 `getToggleArray` 接受一个数组和一个项目， 如果数组包含该项目则移除它，如果不包含则添加它，返回处理后的新数组。

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare function getToggleArray<T>(array: T[], item: T): T[];
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  array | T\[\] | 要处理的数组 |
|  item | T | 要切换的项目 |

**Returns:**

T\[\]

处理后的新数组

## Example


```JavaScript
let arr = [1, 2, 3];
getToggleArray(arr, 4); // [1, 2, 3, 4]
getToggleArray(arr, 2); // [1, 3]
```
